name: london_crews_hill
notes: London green belt: the Crews Hill area of Enfield, a proposed green-belt release in the emerging local plan (about 5,500 homes). Densities are indicative UK design-code tiers (40/65/110 dwellings/ha at household 2.36); target population about 5,500 homes x 2.4. Contiguous urban extension, so dispersal is off. Confirm against the local plan.
